info.name: LMS — Report Card (v1)
info.description:
Student app APIs for the annual report card.

All endpoints are STUDENT-only (Sanctum role `user`) and auto-scoped to the logged-in student. Auth: Sanctum bearer token in `authToken`.

- **List Report Cards** — the student's issued report cards, latest first.
- **Report Card Detail** — the full *Annual Report Card*: per-subject aggregate marks + grade, overall percentage / grade / **rank**, the grading scale, and a `pdf_url`.
- **Report Card PDF** — streams the official report card PDF (the same dompdf template the admin panel generates). The app previews this (book-style) and downloads it.

Grades come from the central grading system in `config/grading.php` (GradingService).

request.description: The logged-in student's issued report cards, latest first. Each item: id, academic_year, class, issued_at, issued_by, status. Use the latest (first) id for the current year in Report Card Detail. Optional filter: academic_year.

Full Annual Report Card. Returns: `title` ('Annual Report Card'), academic_year, class, student {full_name, roll_no, admission_no, image_url}, `subjects[]` (per-subject annual aggregate: obtained, total, percentage, grade), `summary` {total_obtained, total_max, percentage, grade, grade_remark, rank, rank_total, result}, the `grading_scale[]` (grade/min/max/remark) and a `pdf_url`. Percentage, grade and rank are computed dynamically (rank = position within class+section for the year).

Streams the report card as a PDF using the SAME dompdf template the admin panel generates (admin.report-card-pdf — Term-1/Term-2, co-scholastic, attendance). The app previews this in its in-app PDF reader (book-style) with the Sanctum bearer header and downloads the same bytes. 404 when no issued report card exists for the student.
